hooks.command: $g = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.local\bin\graphify.exe'; if (Test-Path $g) { $running = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'graphify.exe'" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\swatch\s' }; if (-not $running) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force graphify-out | Out-Null; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath $g -ArgumentList 'watch','.' -WorkingDirectory (Get-Location) } }
hooks.statusMessage: Démarrage du watcher Graphify (knowledge graph auto-update)
